## Meeting Purpose

[A check-in on content progress and a personal catch-up.](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Blocked:** Publishing of 3 completed articles is paused pending the new blog's launch.](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** Sarah is drafting 3 new articles, but 2 more ideas are needed to fill the queue.](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**Personal Updates:** Aida's cat is recovering from kidney issues, and Nathalie is recovering from a cold.](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Publishing

  - [**Completed:** Aida edited 2 articles; 3 more were sent for review.](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**Blocker:** Publishing is on hold until the new blog is live.](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [**In Progress:** Sarah is drafting 3 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [**Need:** 2 additional article ideas to maintain the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Personal Updates

  - [**Aida's Cat:**](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [**Issue:** High kidney parameters.](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [**Treatment:** Daily weekend IVs to flush kidneys, followed by subcutaneous injections on Wed/Fri and 3 days next week.](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [**Nathalie's Health:**](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
      - [Recovering from a cold with a sore throat and congestion.](https://fathom.video/share/cf_4dNGsk8xmUx5PSDLoYnw9yWmD1ZxW?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
